tables.name: beacon_api_eth_v1_events_execution_payload
tables.description: Execution payload envelope arrivals from beacon API SSE (execution_payload event, fires on import into fork-choice).

columns.name: updated_date_time
columns.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated

columns.name: event_date_time
columns.description: When the sentry received the event from a beacon node

columns.name: slot
columns.description: Slot number from the event payload

columns.name: slot_start_date_time
columns.description: The wall clock time when the slot started

columns.name: propagation_slot_start_diff
columns.description: Difference between event_date_time and slot_start_date_time in ms

columns.name: epoch_start_date_time
columns.description: The wall clock time when the epoch started

columns.name: block_root
columns.description: Beacon block root the envelope references

columns.name: builder_index
columns.description: Index of the builder that produced the payload

columns.name: execution_optimistic
columns.description: Whether the node considered the payload optimistically imported

columns.name: meta_client_name
columns.description: Name of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_id
columns.description: Unique Session ID of the client

tables.name: beacon_api_eth_v1_events_execution_payload_available
tables.description: Execution payload availability signals from beacon API SSE (execution_payload_available event, fires when payload+blobs are locally verified for PTC vote).

columns.name: updated_date_time
columns.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated

columns.name: event_date_time
columns.description: When the sentry received the event from a beacon node

columns.name: slot
columns.description: Slot of the block whose payload is now available

columns.name: slot_start_date_time
columns.description: The wall clock time when the slot started

columns.name: propagation_slot_start_diff
columns.description: Difference between event_date_time and slot_start_date_time in ms

columns.name: epoch_start_date_time
columns.description: The wall clock time when the epoch started

columns.name: block_root
columns.description: Beacon block root whose payload+blobs are locally available

columns.name: meta_client_name
columns.description: Name of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_id
columns.description: Unique Session ID of the client

tables.name: beacon_api_eth_v1_events_execution_payload_bid
tables.description: Builder bids from beacon API SSE (execution_payload_bid event).

columns.name: updated_date_time
columns.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated

columns.name: event_date_time
columns.description: When the sentry received the event from a beacon node

columns.name: slot
columns.description: Slot number from the event payload

columns.name: slot_start_date_time
columns.description: The wall clock time when the slot started

columns.name: propagation_slot_start_diff
columns.description: Difference between event_date_time and slot_start_date_time in ms (negative if observed before slot start)

columns.name: epoch_start_date_time
columns.description: The wall clock time when the epoch started

columns.name: block_hash
columns.description: Execution block hash committed to in the bid

columns.name: meta_client_name
columns.description: Name of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_id
columns.description: Unique Session ID of the client

tables.name: beacon_api_eth_v1_events_execution_payload_gossip
tables.description: Execution payload envelope first-seen-on-gossip arrivals from beacon API SSE (execution_payload_gossip event, fires before import).

columns.name: updated_date_time
columns.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated

columns.name: event_date_time
columns.description: When the sentry received the event from a beacon node

columns.name: slot

columns.name: slot_start_date_time
columns.description: The wall clock time when the slot started

columns.name: propagation_slot_start_diff
columns.description: Difference between event_date_time and slot_start_date_time in ms

columns.name: epoch_start_date_time
columns.description: The wall clock time when the epoch started

columns.name: block_root
columns.description: Beacon block root the envelope references

columns.name: meta_client_id
columns.description: Unique Session ID of the client

tables.name: beacon_api_eth_v1_events_head_v2
tables.description: Contains beacon API eventstream "head_v2" data from each sentry client attached to a beacon node.
tables.sorting_key: meta_network_name, slot_start_date_time, meta_client_name, block, current_epoch_dependent_root, payload_status

columns.name: updated_date_time
columns.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated

columns.name: slot
columns.description: Slot number in the beacon API event stream payload

columns.name: slot_start_date_time
columns.description: The wall clock time when the slot started

columns.name: propagation_slot_start_diff
columns.description: The difference between the event_date_time and the slot_start_date_time

columns.name: block
columns.description: The beacon block root hash in the beacon API event stream payload

columns.name: epoch
columns.description: The epoch number in the beacon API event stream payload

columns.name: epoch_start_date_time
columns.description: The wall clock time when the epoch started

columns.name: payload_status
columns.description: The payload availability for the head block (empty/full) in the beacon API event stream payload

columns.name: epoch_transition
columns.description: If the event is an epoch transition

columns.name: execution_optimistic
columns.description: If the attached beacon node is running in execution optimistic mode

columns.name: current_epoch_dependent_root
columns.description: The current epoch dependent root in the beacon API event stream payload

columns.name: next_epoch_dependent_root
columns.description: The next epoch dependent root in the beacon API event stream payload

columns.name: meta_client_name
columns.description: Name of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_version
columns.description: Version of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_implementation
columns.description: Implementation of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_os
columns.description: Operating system of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_ip
columns.description: IP address of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_city
columns.description: City of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_country
columns.description: Country of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_country_code
columns.description: Country code of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_continent_code
columns.description: Continent code of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_longitude
columns.description: Longitude of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_latitude
columns.description: Latitude of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_autonomous_system_number
columns.description: Autonomous system number of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_autonomous_system_organization
columns.description: Autonomous system organization of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_consensus_version
columns.description: Ethereum consensus client version that generated the event

columns.name: meta_consensus_version_major
columns.description: Ethereum consensus client major version that generated the event

columns.name: meta_consensus_version_minor
columns.description: Ethereum consensus client minor version that generated the event

columns.name: meta_consensus_version_patch
columns.description: Ethereum consensus client patch version that generated the event

columns.name: meta_consensus_implementation
columns.description: Ethereum consensus client implementation that generated the event

tables.name: beacon_api_eth_v1_events_payload_attestation
tables.description: Individual PTC payload attestation messages from beacon API SSE (payload_attestation_message event, ~512 per slot).

columns.name: updated_date_time
columns.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated

columns.name: event_date_time
columns.description: When the sentry received the event from a beacon node

columns.name: slot
columns.description: Slot number from the event payload

columns.name: slot_start_date_time
columns.description: The wall clock time when the slot started

columns.name: propagation_slot_start_diff
columns.description: Difference between event_date_time and slot_start_date_time in ms

columns.name: epoch_start_date_time
columns.description: The wall clock time when the epoch started

columns.name: payload_present
columns.description: Whether the validator attests payload was present

columns.name: blob_data_available
columns.description: Whether the validator attests blob data was available

columns.name: meta_client_name
columns.description: Name of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_id
columns.description: Unique Session ID of the client

tables.name: beacon_api_eth_v1_events_proposer_preferences
tables.description: Proposer preferences from beacon API SSE (proposer_preferences event).

columns.name: updated_date_time
columns.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated

columns.name: event_date_time
columns.description: When the sentry received the event from a beacon node

columns.name: slot_start_date_time
columns.description: The wall clock time when the slot started

columns.name: propagation_slot_start_diff
columns.description: Difference between event_date_time and slot_start_date_time in ms (negative if observed before slot start)

columns.name: epoch_start_date_time
columns.description: The wall clock time when the epoch started

columns.name: meta_client_name
columns.description: Name of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_id
columns.description: Unique Session ID of the client

tables.name: beacon_synthetic_builder_pending_payment_settlement
tables.description: Builder pending payment settle/drop decisions at epoch boundary (EIP-7732 ePBS) synthesized from TYSM-instrumented beacon node internals. Multi-witness (per-node).

columns.name: updated_date_time
columns.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated

columns.name: event_date_time
columns.description: When the beacon node processed this settlement (TYSM ResolvedAt)

columns.name: epoch
columns.description: Epoch boundary at which this settlement was processed

columns.name: epoch_start_date_time
columns.description: The wall clock time when the epoch started

columns.name: builder_index
columns.description: Index of the builder in the builder registry

columns.name: meta_client_name
columns.description: Name of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_id
columns.description: Unique Session ID of the client

tables.name: beacon_synthetic_payload_attestation_processed
tables.description: PTC votes after full gossip validation completed (EIP-7732 ePBS) synthesized from TYSM-instrumented beacon node internals. Enrichment counterpart to beacon_api_eth_v1_events_payload_attestation. Multi-witness (per-node).

columns.name: updated_date_time
columns.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated

columns.name: event_date_time
columns.description: When the beacon node processed this PTC vote (TYSM ProcessedAt)

columns.name: slot
columns.description: Slot the PTC vote applies to

columns.name: slot_start_date_time
columns.description: The wall clock time when the slot started

columns.name: propagation_slot_start_diff
columns.description: Difference between processed_at and slot_start_date_time in ms

columns.name: epoch_start_date_time
columns.description: The wall clock time when the epoch started

columns.name: beacon_block_root
columns.description: Beacon block root the PTC validator attested to

columns.name: payload_present
columns.description: Whether the validator attests payload was present

columns.name: blob_data_available
columns.description: Whether the validator attests blob data was available

columns.name: peer_id
columns.description: Peer ID we received this PTC vote from on the gossip wire

columns.name: processing_duration_ms
columns.description: Time from gossip receipt to processing completion in milliseconds

columns.name: received_at
columns.description: Wall-clock time the PTC vote was first received from gossip

columns.name: meta_client_name
columns.description: Name of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_id
columns.description: Unique Session ID of the client

tables.name: beacon_synthetic_payload_status_resolved
tables.description: Fork-choice payload status transitions (EIP-7732 ePBS) synthesized from TYSM-instrumented beacon node internals. Multi-witness (per-node).

columns.name: updated_date_time
columns.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated

columns.name: event_date_time
columns.description: When the beacon node resolved the status (TYSM ResolvedAt)

columns.name: slot
columns.description: Slot number whose payload status was resolved

columns.name: slot_start_date_time
columns.description: The wall clock time when the slot started

columns.name: propagation_slot_start_diff
columns.description: Difference between event_date_time and slot_start_date_time in ms

columns.name: epoch_start_date_time
columns.description: The wall clock time when the epoch started

columns.name: block_root
columns.description: Beacon block root for this slot

columns.name: status
columns.description: New status: PENDING / FULL / EMPTY / INVALID

columns.name: payload_timeliness_votes_positive
columns.description: Count of PTC votes with payload_present=true

columns.name: payload_timeliness_votes_negative
columns.description: Count of PTC votes with payload_present=false (explicit negative). NULL when CL does not surface three-state PR #5180 breakdown

columns.name: payload_timeliness_votes_absent
columns.description: Count of PTC seats with no vote (Optional[bool]==None per PR #5180). NULL when CL does not surface the breakdown

columns.name: data_available_votes_positive
columns.description: Count of PTC votes with blob_data_available=true

columns.name: data_available_votes_negative
columns.description: Count of PTC votes with blob_data_available=false (explicit negative). NULL when CL does not surface three-state PR #5180 breakdown

columns.name: data_available_votes_absent
columns.description: Count of PTC seats with no data-availability vote (Optional[bool]==None per PR #5180). NULL when CL does not surface the breakdown

columns.name: meta_client_name
columns.description: Name of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_id
columns.description: Unique Session ID of the client

tables.name: canonical_beacon_block_access_list
tables.sorting_key: slot_start_date_time, meta_network_name, block_hash, address, change_type, storage_key, block_access_index

tables.name: canonical_beacon_block_execution_payload_bid
tables.description: Winning execution payload bid from canonical beacon blocks (1 per block).

columns.name: updated_date_time
columns.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated

columns.name: slot
columns.description: Slot number of the block containing this bid

columns.name: slot_start_date_time
columns.description: The wall clock time when the slot started

columns.name: epoch_start_date_time
columns.description: The wall clock time when the epoch started

columns.name: block_root
columns.description: Root of the block containing this bid

columns.name: builder_index
columns.description: Index of the builder in the builder registry

columns.name: block_hash
columns.description: Execution block hash committed to in the bid

columns.name: gas_limit
columns.description: Gas limit for the execution payload

columns.name: meta_client_name
columns.description: Name of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_id
columns.description: Unique Session ID of the client

tables.name: canonical_beacon_block_payload_attestation
tables.description: Aggregated PTC payload attestations from canonical beacon blocks (max 4 per block).

columns.name: updated_date_time
columns.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated

columns.name: slot
columns.description: Slot number of the block containing this payload attestation

columns.name: slot_start_date_time
columns.description: The wall clock time when the slot started

columns.name: epoch_start_date_time
columns.description: The wall clock time when the epoch started

columns.name: block_root
columns.description: Root of the block containing this attestation

columns.name: position
columns.description: Position of the payload attestation in the block body (0-3)

columns.name: beacon_block_root
columns.description: The block root being attested to by the PTC

columns.name: payload_present
columns.description: Whether the PTC attests payload was present

columns.name: blob_data_available
columns.description: Whether the PTC attests blob data was available

columns.name: aggregation_bits
columns.description: Bitvector of PTC members (512 bits) as hex

columns.name: attesting_validator_count
columns.description: Number of PTC validators in this aggregation

columns.name: meta_client_name
columns.description: Name of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_id
columns.description: Unique Session ID of the client

tables.name: libp2p_gossipsub_execution_payload_bid
tables.description: Builder bid gossip propagation from libp2p.

columns.name: updated_date_time
columns.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated

columns.name: event_date_time
columns.description: Timestamp of the event with millisecond precision

columns.name: slot_start_date_time
columns.description: Start date and time of the slot

columns.name: epoch_start_date_time
columns.description: Start date and time of the epoch

columns.name: wallclock_slot
columns.description: Wall clock slot when the event was received

columns.name: wallclock_slot_start_date_time
columns.description: Start time of the wall clock slot

columns.name: wallclock_epoch
columns.description: Wall clock epoch when the event was received

columns.name: wallclock_epoch_start_date_time
columns.description: Start time of the wall clock epoch

columns.name: propagation_slot_start_diff
columns.description: Propagation delay from slot start in ms (negative if observed before slot start)

columns.name: block_hash
columns.description: Execution block hash committed to in the bid

columns.name: peer_id_unique_key
columns.description: Unique key for the peer identifier

columns.name: message_size
columns.description: Size of the message in bytes

columns.name: topic_fork_digest_value
columns.description: Fork digest value of the topic

columns.name: meta_client_name
columns.description: Name of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_id
columns.description: Unique Session ID of the client
